reviews.comment:
No me dieron el recibo por la Nafta (bencina), me parece que fue un hecho aislado. Pero siempre deben dar el recibo al cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
They didn't give me a receipt for the gasoline; I think it was an isolated incident. But they should always give a receipt when you fill up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOajlYazdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy limpios los baños, para cargar nafta una fila interminable, si podés hacerlo en otro lado es lo ideal!

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were very clean, but the line to get gas was endless; if you can do it somewhere else, that's ideal!

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment: If only gas was this cheap in the US! Full service, 93 octane... for around $2 a gallon!
